n_substrates_note: GRAIL & SyGMa on n≈1170; tier-2 (BioTransformer, MetaPredictor, MetaTrans) on the n=150 shared subset.
reading: recall@15 is not budget-fair: SyGMa's 0.554 is emitted over ~74 predictions (precision 0.029), ~7x GRAIL's ~8.7 (precision 0.109). At recall@5 (matched small budget) the recall spread narrows. Precision (recall per prediction) reorders the board toward the low-output methods.
